scene_description: A person is handling a utensil over a countertop while a drawer below reveals several colorful plastic dishes and cups.

candidates.rationale: The storage space beneath the main counter surface is visible, exposing the dishes stored inside.

candidates.target_object: green utensil held by the hand
candidates.rationale: There appears to be dark residue or food material visible on the tip of the green utensil.

scene_description: A person is interacting with a wooden shape-sorter toy box using metal tongs on a dark table.

candidates.target_object: The middle drawer of the wooden toy box
candidates.rationale: The drawer is visibly pulled out and extended from the main body of the toy box.
The triangular block is resting on the table surface next to the toy box, not placed through any of the shape-sorter slots.

scene_description: A robot arm is reaching towards a table containing several cups and a large jar of pistachios, next to an opened drawer.

candidates.rationale: The drawer is pulled out from the cabinet, exposing its white interior.
The pink cup is lying horizontally on its side on the table surface.

scene_description: An overhead view of a desk surface showing packaged snacks and a partially opened drawer underneath a black surface.

candidates.rationale: The storage drawer is pulled out from the desk unit, exposing the contents inside.
The blue marker lying in the top compartment of the drawer has its cap securely in place.

scene_description: A robot arm is holding a notebook on a wooden desk in an office environment.

candidates.rationale: The front and back covers of the notebook are pressed together, showing it is shut.
The pen holder contains several visible pens and pencils, meaning it is not empty.

scene_description: Various objects, including cables, electronic components, a bowl, and a marker, are placed on a desk next to a robot arm, with an open cardboard box resting on the floor.

candidates.rationale: The top flaps of the box are unfolded, clearly exposing the interior space.
The black cable is coiled on the desk, and its visible ends are not connected to any socket or external device.

scene_description: A wooden conference table holds various electronic devices, office supplies, and a person's legs are visible underneath.

candidates.rationale: The screen of the tablet device is illuminated and displaying user interface information.
At least two blue pens are clearly visible standing inside the black desk organizer.

scene_description: A desk is shown with two black organizers holding various office supplies, and a hand is reaching toward a pen holder.

candidates.rationale: The light blue plastic cap is securely attached to the tip of the marker.
The pen holder contains several pens visible inside its volume.

scene_description: A robotic arm is positioned near an office chair that holds a green tray filled with miscellaneous items.

candidates.rationale: The seat of the chair is empty of a person, although it holds a tray of objects.
The apples visible in the tray are whole and have not been sliced.

scene_description: A black folding table holds various tools and coiled cables, with a large cardboard box resting on the floor beneath it.

candidates.target_object: cardboard shipping box on the floor
candidates.rationale: The top flaps of the cardboard box are separated and not sealed shut, indicating it is opened.

candidates.target_object: orange coiled cord on the table
candidates.rationale: The orange cord is visibly wound into a tight, neat coil, meaning it is not uncoiled.

scene_description: A robotic arm is interacting with several dry-erase markers on a wooden table surrounded by cups, bowls, and snacks.

candidates.rationale: The chip bag is visually intact and appears to be fully sealed, not opened.
Every visible Expo marker has its orange cap securely attached to the writing end.
